heading.en: Things are nouns — add -s for plural

body.en: Name things with nouns. Put a or the before them. Make most plurals by adding -s (dog -> dogs). With 600 thing words plus a/the and -s, you can name the world.
body.zh: 用名词指称事物，前面加 a 或 the。大多数复数加 -s（dog→dogs）。用 600 个“事物”词，加上 a/the 和 -s，就能命名整个世界。

gloss.en: teaching and learning, often in schools

words.example: She got a good education.

gloss.en: a change that something causes; a result

words.example: The rain had a bad effect on the crops.

gloss.en: the final part of something

words.example: This is the end of the story.

gloss.en: a mistake

words.example: There is an error in your work.

gloss.en: a thing that happens, often important

words.example: The party was a big event.

gloss.en: a thing that shows what you mean

words.example: Let me give you an example.

gloss.en: giving one thing and getting another back

words.example: They made an exchange of gifts.

gloss.en: the state of being real or alive

words.example: I did not know of his existence.

gloss.en: getting bigger in size or amount

words.example: The city saw fast expansion.

gloss.en: skill or knowledge gained by doing something

words.example: She has years of experience.

gloss.en: a person who knows a lot about something

words.example: Ask an expert for help.

gloss.en: a thing that is known to be true

words.example: That is a well-known fact.

gloss.en: an act of falling down

words.example: He had a bad fall.

gloss.en: parents and their children

words.example: I love my family.

gloss.en: a male parent

words.example: My father is at work.

gloss.en: the bad feeling when you are in danger

words.example: Her eyes showed no fear.

gloss.en: something you feel in your mind or body

words.example: I had a feeling of joy.

gloss.en: stories about people and events that are not real

words.example: I like reading fiction.

gloss.en: open land for growing crops or animals

words.example: The cows are in the field.

gloss.en: a struggle using physical force

words.example: There was a fight in the street.

gloss.en: the flames and heat from something burning

words.example: Most animals are afraid of fire.

gloss.en: the bright hot part of a fire

words.example: I saw the flame of a match.

gloss.en: a journey by air in a plane

words.example: We had a smooth flight.

gloss.en: the colourful part of a plant

words.example: The plant has a red flower.

gloss.en: a part of cloth that is folded over

words.example: There is a fold in her dress.

gloss.en: things that people or animals eat

words.example: We have food and drink.

gloss.en: physical power used to do something

words.example: They opened the door by force.

gloss.en: a type or kind of something

words.example: Ice is a form of water.

gloss.en: a person you know well and like

words.example: This is my friend Tom.

gloss.en: the part that faces forward

words.example: Sit at the front of the bus.

gloss.en: the sweet part of a plant you can eat

words.example: I eat fruit every day.

gloss.en: a hard clear material used for windows

words.example: The window is made of glass.

gloss.en: a shiny yellow precious metal

words.example: The ring is made of gold.

gloss.en: the people who control a country

words.example: The government made a new law.

gloss.en: the small seeds of plants like wheat or rice

words.example: They sold a lot of grain.

gloss.en: the green plant that covers the ground

words.example: The children play on the grass.

gloss.en: a tight hold on something

words.example: Keep a tight grip on the rope.

gloss.en: a number of people or things together

words.example: A group of friends came to visit.

gloss.en: the process of growing bigger

words.example: Water helps plant growth.

gloss.en: a person who shows others the way

words.example: Our guide showed us the town.

gloss.en: a safe place by the coast for ships

words.example: The boats lay in the harbour.

gloss.en: a state of peace and agreement

words.example: They live in harmony.

gloss.en: a very strong feeling of dislike

words.example: She gave him a look of hate.

gloss.en: the ability to hear

words.example: Her hearing is poor.

gloss.en: the quality of being hot

words.example: I can feel the heat of the sun.

gloss.en: the act of helping someone

words.example: Thank you for all your help.

gloss.en: all the events that happened in the past

words.example: I like to read about history.

gloss.en: an empty space in something solid

words.example: He dug a deep hole.

gloss.en: a feeling that something good will happen

words.example: Don't lose hope.

gloss.en: a period of 60 minutes

words.example: I waited for an hour.

gloss.en: the quality of being funny

words.example: The story was full of humour.

gloss.en: water that has frozen and become hard

words.example: There was ice on the windows.

gloss.en: a thought or plan in your mind

words.example: That is a good idea.

gloss.en: a sudden strong wish to do something

words.example: She bought it on an impulse.

gloss.en: a rise in amount or number

words.example: There was an increase in price.

gloss.en: the making of goods in factories

words.example: This city has a lot of industry.

gloss.en: coloured liquid used for writing

words.example: The letter was written in ink.

gloss.en: a small creature with six legs

words.example: Birds eat insects all day.

gloss.en: a thing used to make music

words.example: She can play an instrument.

gloss.en: a plan you pay for to cover loss or harm

words.example: They have health insurance.

gloss.en: the wish to learn more about something

words.example: She has an interest in music.

gloss.en: a new thing that someone has made

words.example: The phone was a great invention.

gloss.en: a hard strong metal

words.example: The gates are made of iron.

gloss.en: a soft sweet food that shakes

words.example: The kids love jelly.

gloss.en: to connect two or more things together

words.example: Join one pipe to the next.

gloss.en: an act of travelling from one place to another

words.example: They went on a long journey.

gloss.en: a person who decides things in a court

words.example: The judge made a decision.

gloss.en: an act of jumping

words.example: He made a big jump.

gloss.en: a hit with the foot or leg

words.example: He gave the ball a kick.

gloss.en: an act of touching with the lips to show love

words.example: Come here and give me a kiss!

gloss.en: the things you know and understand

words.example: He has a lot of knowledge.

gloss.en: the dry part of the earth, not the sea

words.example: The birds flew over the land.

gloss.en: the words people use to speak and write

words.example: English is a useful language.

gloss.en: the sound you make when something is funny

words.example: She gave a happy laugh.

gloss.en: a rule made by the country

words.example: It is against the law to steal.

gloss.en: to go in front to show the way

words.example: You lead and I will follow.

gloss.en: the process of gaining knowledge

words.example: Reading helps learning.

gloss.en: material made from animal skin

words.example: He wore a leather jacket.

gloss.en: a written message you send to someone

words.example: I will write you a letter.

gloss.en: a point on a scale of amount or height

words.example: The water rose to a high level.

gloss.en: a machine that carries people up and down

words.example: Let's take the lift.

gloss.en: the brightness that lets us see

words.example: Please turn on the light.

gloss.en: the greatest amount that is allowed

words.example: There is a speed limit here.

gloss.en: cloth made from a plant called flax

words.example: The shirt is made of linen.

gloss.en: a substance that flows, like water

words.example: Water is a liquid.

gloss.en: names or things written one after another

words.example: I made a list of names.

gloss.en: an act of looking at something

words.example: Have a look at this.

gloss.en: the state of no longer having something

words.example: I want to report the loss of a bag.

gloss.en: a strong feeling of caring for someone

words.example: A mother's love is strong.

gloss.en: a tool with parts that does a task

words.example: This machine washes clothes.

gloss.en: an adult male human

words.example: A young man came in.

gloss.en: a person in charge of a business or shop

words.example: She is the bank manager.

gloss.en: a sign or spot on a surface

words.example: There is a dirty mark on your shirt.

gloss.en: a place where people buy and sell goods

words.example: We bought fruit at the market.

gloss.en: a large amount of something

words.example: A mass of people filled the street.

gloss.en: the food you eat at one time

words.example: We had a big meal.

gloss.en: an action taken to reach a goal

words.example: They took a safety measure.

gloss.en: the part of an animal eaten as food

words.example: I do not eat meat.

gloss.en: a time when people come together to talk

words.example: We have a meeting today.

gloss.en: the ability to remember things

words.example: I have a bad memory for names.
